care.summary: Popular indoor foliage plant with striking red-pink variegated leaves; excellent for low-light areas.
care.water: Keep soil evenly moist; allow top inch to dry between waterings
care.fertilizer: Balanced liquid fertilizer monthly during growing season
care.toxicity: Toxic to pets and humans if ingested due to calcium oxalate crystals
common_issues: Brown leaf tips from dry air or fluoride in water
Leggy growth in very low light
tips: Wipe leaves with damp cloth to keep them dust-free and shiny
Use distilled or filtered water to avoid leaf tip burn
Rotate plant periodically for even growth
Can tolerate fluorescent office lighting well
